title: Wide and long amorphous metal sheet and manufacture thereof
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain a product having excellent physical properties and performance such as external appearance, strength efficiency by a simple operation by laterally continuously arranging in parallel a plurality of amorphous metal thin film ribbons, and forming the lengthwise direction of the ribbons being long as lateral direction.
CONSTITUTION: A plurality of amorphous metal thin film ribbons are laterally continuously arranged in parallel, and the adjacent side edges of the ribbons are conductively applied. The amorphous metal sheet having long wide width is formed to be long in both longitudinal and lateral directions. The ribbon is formed of a thin film made of amorphous metal and a conductive metal plated layer covering at least one side face. The conductive adherence may be soldered or applied with adhesive. The thin film has a thickness of 70μm or less, and the plated layer of the thin film has a thickness of 0.1μm or more. Further, the thin film is made of amorphous metal which contains Fe as main ingredient, and at least one type selected from B, Si, C, Co, Ni and Mo.
description: [0001]"Technical field" The present invention is wide and long amorphous metal sheets and its manufacturing method. If detail below, the present invention, wide and long sheet without causing wrinkling, aesthetic appearance, and, with respect to the electromagnetic wave shielding effect, a practically sufficient mechanical strength of the amorphous metal sheets and its manufacturing method is wide and long. [0002]"Conventional" In recent years the development of electronics and popular, these devices, and/or static electricity can be protected from adverse effects of electromagnetic wave, and, practically sufficient mechanical strength is required from the sheet material. Conventionally, in order to protect the electronics from static electricity, the carbon powder or fiber, or metal foil or powder containing a conductive material containing conductive sheet is used, such conventional electrically conductive sheet, for protecting the electronics from electromagnetic waves is not sufficient and effective say, further, is not sufficient in mechanical strength was say. [0003]Therefore, the amorphous metal (amorphous) electromagnetic shielding and protective effects in both the static and using sufficient, and waterproofness are excellent, and, practically sufficient mechanical strength for use with a laminated sheet material have been attempted. However, in general, amorphous metal is a, the width of ribbon-like material is supplied and a 2.54-a 10.16 cm, in the near future, it is expected that supply of 20.32 cm width, such a ribbon-shaped, or narrow material, coated sheet material is almost impossible to use has been considered. Also, in the present invention, the thin film of amorphous metal ribbon of amorphous metal sheet such as a wide and long, efficiently by a simple operation, excellent appearance, physical properties such as strength and performance can be produced by a method that tries. [0005]"Means for solving the problem" According to the present invention, the plurality of amorphous metal thin ribbons which are arranged in parallel in the lateral direction, the side edge of the conductive ribbon is bonded adjacent to each other, the length of the ribbon width direction as long and wide and long amorphous metal sheets are formed. [0006]According to the present invention, moreover, the plurality of amorphous metal thin film ribbon arranged in parallel in the lateral direction, the side edge of the conductive ribbon is bonded adjacent to each other, the length of the widthwise direction of the sheet forming the ribbon as wide and long and wide and long amorphous metal sheet is provided. As the conductive metal, e.g. copper, nickel, cobalt, iron, aluminum, gold, silver, tin, zinc and their alloys can be used as selected from 2 or more. Such plating may be obtained by the plating film, and having the amorphous metal magnetic field shielding properties, electric field shielding layer is added, the film as a whole, with respect to electromagnetic waves over a wide range from low to high frequency, an excellent shielding effect can be shown. Further, the metal plating layer is electrically conductive, solder or adhesive bonded amorphous metal sheet has an improved effect.
